title: Roasted Radish and Peppery Tapas
description: A simple yet flavorful Spanish-inspired tapas dish featuring roasted radish and peppery tapenade. Perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 2. Cut the radish into thin slices and place on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic, salt, and black pepper.
4. Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender and lightly caramelized.
5. Meanwhile, toast the bread until crispy.
6. Spread the toasted bread with tapenade made from roasted red pepper and peppercorns.
7. Top with shaved Manchego cheese and a sprinkle of black pepper.
8. Serve the roasted radish on top of the tapenade and cheese.
9. Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
